LanguageData.FB_CortexMiteAnchor_Desc: Choose a reachable flesh floor cell. The cortex mite will crawl there and become a permanent research node.
LanguageData.FB_CortexMiteAnchor_NotFleshTerrain: Cortex mites can only anchor into flesh terrain.
LanguageData.FB_CortexMiteAnchor_Unreachable: The cortex mite cannot reach that cell.
LanguageData.FB_CortexMiteAnchor_MissingDef: Cortex mite anchoring is missing required defs.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrainNeuralActivity_Desc: Turns the colony brain into a neural research station. While a research project is selected, it researches at the rate of one anchored cortex mite and raises the brain's hemogel consumption from 2 to 6 per hour.
LanguageData.FB_ColonyBrainNeuralActivity_NoProjectIn: Neural activity: waiting for a selected research project
